recommendations.title: Humpty Sharma Ki Dulhania
recommendations.overview: A girl from Ambala, Kavya Pratap Singh, is about to be married. When she visits Delhi to shop for her 'dhai lakh ka Ghagra'(wedding dress worth Rs. 2.5 Lakh), she meets Humpty Sharma, a carefree Delhiite, and falls in love with him.

recommendations.title: Deidra & Laney Rob a Train
recommendations.overview: After their mother ends up in jail, two sisters turn to train robbery in order to support their family.

recommendations.title: Big is Beautiful
recommendations.overview: A resort for individuals who want to lose weight is helps several women discover friendships, acceptance with body image and hard truths.

recommendations.title: I'm Losing It
recommendations.overview: There's two great loves in Anya's life, her athlete  boyfriend Zhenya and food. Zhenya is not happy how Anya has been gaining weight due to her eating habits and decides to dump her. But Anya doesn't want to give up and decides to get rid of excess w

recommendations.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding 2
recommendations.overview: The continuing adventures of the Portokalos family. A follow-up to the 2002 comedy, "My Big Fat Greek Wedding."

recommendations.title: Bachelorette
recommendations.overview: Three friends are asked to be bridesmaids at a wedding of a woman they used to ridicule back in high school.

recommendations.title: The Happiest Day in the Life of Olli Mäki
recommendations.overview: Summer 1962 and Olli Mäki has a shot at the world championship title in featherweight boxing. From the Finnish countryside to the bright lights of Helsinki, everything has been prepared for his fame and fortune. All Olli has to do is lose weight and

recommendations.title: Mr. Monk's Last Case: A Monk Movie
recommendations.overview: Monk steps out of retirement as his stepdaughter's wedding turns tragic when her fiancé dies in a bungee jumping accident.

recommendations.title: Queen
recommendations.overview: Rani, a 24-year-old homely girl, decides to go on her honeymoon alone when her fiancé calls off the wedding. Traveling around Europe, she finds joy, makes friends, and gains new-found independence.

recommendations.title: Super Size Me
